M1.name: Audit existing reward touchpoints
M1.finding: 5 modules identified for reward wiring: voice/pipeline, voice/router, tools/sanitation_verifier, tools/bom_cleaner, training/shadow_protocol. CCP (M5) added as 6th target after deployment.

M3.name: Wire sanitation tools to reward bus
signals: sanitation_check_fail (-0.5, negative, needs_review) — per failed check
bom_scan_clean (+0.1, process) — when scan finds 0 BOM

M4.name: Wire shadow_protocol.py to reward bus
M4.design_note: Compound signal = process_total x merit_outcome provides non-linear QLoRA gradient: high quality + high merit = multiplicative reward

M5.name: Wire CCP pipeline + router to reward bus

M6.name: PM hook point stubs in voice/router.py
M6.note: Comments added for pm_item_created/completed/blocked/stale and decision lifecycle signals. Activated when PM surface goes live.

M8.name: Verification + AAR
checks: publish_reward importable + writes signal to JSONL
JSONL files exist on disk with signals
shadow_protocol wired (5 process + outcome + negative + compound)
ccp pipeline wired (4 signals across pipeline steps)

signal_taxonomy.process: Intermediate step completed — earns small positive reward for doing work
signal_taxonomy.outcome: End result achieved — higher reward for delivering value
signal_taxonomy.negative: Failure or quality violation — penalizes bad patterns, triggers review queue
signal_taxonomy.compound: Multi-dimensional product signal for non-linear QLoRA gradient

design_decisions: All _reward() calls are non-fatal (wrapped in try/except) — reward bus failure never crashes callers
Reward files partitioned by source + ISO week for efficient rotation (rotate_files() archives >4 weeks)
auto_flag_negative=True in publish_reward: value < -0.3 automatically sets needs_review=True
Compound signal (shadow_protocol) = process_total x outcome provides curved QLoRA gradient
qlora_deployment_held blocks checkpoint deployment until Jamie reviews flagged signals
next_steps: Wire friday/skills/morning_briefing.py to aggregate_rewards(window=today) for voice briefing
Wire nightly_training.py to check_qlora_hold() before checkpoint deployment
Activate PM hook point stubs in voice/router.py when PM surface is live
Add reward signals to epos_doctor.py health checks
